creator: claudio@claudio.csita.unige.it
text:
I tried to display the directory of files present on my mp-man.
This was the response i got from mpmf20

# mpmf20 -d

   entry count: 0
  total memory: 65536 KB
   used memory: 65552 KB
 unused memory: -16 KB
flash ram type: internal

My mp-man is equipped with the standard internal 32Mb flash memory.
I guess something is wrong with integer math counting and managing
memory blocks on the mp-man

How-To-Repeat: mpmf20 -d
